purpose: hipEngine MTP verifier economics over the llama.cpp mtp-bench prompt suite.

source_prompt_suite.note: The original script sends these prompts as single user chat messages to an OpenAI-compatible llama.cpp server. hipEngine encodes the raw prompt text unless a future tokenizer/template option is added.

tokenization: raw prompt text encoded with model tokenizer.json

results.name: code_python
results.command: /home/lhl/hipEngine/.venv/bin/python scripts/mtp_verifier_economics.py --model /home/lhl/models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens-file /tmp/hipengine-mtp-gfx1151-runs/20260615-060801/hipengine-paro-mtp-b1-raw/code_python/prompt-tokens.txt --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 1 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1151 --hip-arch gfx1151 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-gfx1151-runs/20260615-060801/hipengine-paro-mtp-b1-raw/code_python/raw --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-gfx1151-runs/20260615-060801/hipengine-paro-mtp-b1-raw/code_python/economics.json --small-batch-decode-threshold 7 --acceptance-diagnostics --llama-target-cycle-cost 2.0
